releases.title: collectZ v3.4.145
releases.summary: This patch adds a read-only Plex provider/API import parity proof before any future migration away from the current library-section import path.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.144
releases.summary: This patch adds a guarded attach-existing path for Plex reconciliation conflicts so an admin can link a Plex identity to an existing collectZ title when the identifiers are safe.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.143
releases.summary: This patch adds a durable Plex reconciliation conflict review queue so unsafe Plex sync matches can be resolved intentionally after automated sync.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.142
releases.summary: This patch makes Plex TV watched-state writeback episode-aware instead of blocking TV series outright.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.141
releases.summary: This patch removes the confusing 1000-title Plex reconciliation cap and adds scheduled reconciliation sync automation.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.140
releases.summary: This patch turns the Plex reconciliation proof into a conservative one-way sync job.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.139
releases.summary: This patch adds a temporary read-only Plex reconciliation review UI.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.138
releases.summary: This patch normalizes collectZ user ratings to a 0-10 internal scale while preserving the existing 5-star UI.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.137
releases.summary: This patch adds a queued Plex reconciliation preview job.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.136
releases.summary: This patch adds a read-only Plex full-library reconciliation preview.
